pr_title: Change markdown rendering from blackfriday to goldmark
pr_body:
Markdown rendering and stripping moved from blackfriday to goldmark.

There are multiple subtle changes required to the standard goldmark extensions to keep
current rendering and defaults. This raises the possibility that we should extend these to do rendering for ourselves. In particular we can go further with goldmark linkify extension and have this make running the link processor unnecessary.

Need to think about how to go about allowing extensions - at present it seems that these would be hard to do without recompilation.

~~Fixes #9182~~ Fixes #9487
Fixes #4916 (closed but was not fixed before)
Should probably fix #4027
